columns.name: ANLEGGNR
columns.description: Unique identifier for the anlegging

columns.name: AVDNR
columns.description: Department or division number

columns.name: AVDNAVN
columns.description: Name of the department or division

columns.name: MIDL_VANNPROS
columns.description: Percentage of middle water process

columns.name: AVD_MOLLE
columns.description: Molle code for the department or division

columns.name: PARTINR
columns.description: Part number identifier

columns.name: PARTINR2
columns.description: Second part number identifier

columns.name: RAAKORN
columns.description: Code for raw material

columns.name: KORNOMRAADE
columns.description: Area of corn production

columns.name: AVDNR_MA
columns.description: Main department or division number

columns.name: NOMINELL_KAPASITET
columns.description: Nominal capacity of the anlegging

columns.name: SATS_NOMINELL
columns.description: Nominal rate or price per unit

columns.name: SATS_VARIABEL
columns.description: Variable rate or price per unit

columns.name: HOVEDANLEGG
columns.description: Code for the main anlegging

columns.name: EGEN_PRODUKSJON
columns.description: Indicates if production is own or external

columns.name: FOR_TIL_AVD
columns.description: Amount forwarded to another department or division

columns.name: MAT_TIL_AVD
columns.description: Amount of materials for another department or division

columns.name: UT_TYPE
columns.description: Code indicating the type of output

columns.name: ADMINISTRASJON
columns.description: Administrative information or code

columns.name: OKO_ANLEGGNR
columns.description: Okonometric anlegging number for statistical purposes

columns.name: DATO_FIL_TIL_SK
columns.description: Date when the file was sent to Sk (likely a regulatory body)

columns.name: KORNHANDLER
columns.description: Code for corn dealer or supplier

columns.name: VISES_WEB
columns.description: Indicates if the data is visible on a web platform or not
